response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 12 years in the field, including roles at re:cinq and Optilyz where she worked on full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and system optimization. Her technical expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK), aligning closely with the primary stack requirements. Additionally, she has worked with Kotlin/Java for backend services and contributed to open-source projects, showcasing her versatility and commitment to best practices. Her background in AI agent development and contributions to scalable systems further strengthen her fit for the role.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, with experience in full-stack development and system optimization.
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, demonstrating forward-thinking technical skills.
Strong background in cloud platforms (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and scalable system design.
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement, though she has worked with similar backend frameworks like Express.js.
Minimal mention of Vitest, a required testing framework, though she has experience with Jest and other testing tools.
No explicit experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL in the provided resume, though she has worked with MongoDB and SQL.
